explanation.en: There is no such thing as immigration insurance. The government does not sell insurance by phone.
explanation.es: No existe algo llamado seguro migratorio. El gobierno no vende seguros por telefono.

explanation.en: No insurer can change your visa status. This is a pressure tactic.
explanation.es: Ninguna aseguradora puede cambiar tu visa. Es una tactica de presion.

explanation.en: Financing insurance above 20% APR is predatory. Typical rates are much lower.
explanation.es: Financiar el seguro por arriba de 20% APR es depredador. Las tasas normales son mucho menores.

explanation.en: Legitimate insurance always requires documentation. No paperwork usually means no real policy.
explanation.es: El seguro legitimo siempre pide documentos. Sin papeles suele significar que no hay poliza real.

explanation.en: Wire-only payment is a common scam indicator. Legitimate insurers accept safer payment methods.
explanation.es: Pedir solo transferencia es una senal comun de estafa. Las aseguradoras legitimas aceptan pagos mas seguros.

explanation.en: Real insurers ask basic questions. Guaranteed approval with no review is suspicious.
explanation.es: Las aseguradoras reales hacen preguntas basicas. Aprobacion garantizada sin revision es sospechoso.
